# Tool Selection

The third-party libraries and infrastructure we standardise on across Billpay-core. Each choice is documented with the alternatives we considered and why the chosen one won — these are load-bearing decisions, not defaults.

- [Choice of HTTPClient — OkHttpClient](./http-client.md)
- [Choice of Database — Oracle](./database.md)
- [Choice of DataSource — AgroalDataSource](./datasource.md)
- [Choice of ORM — Exposed](./orm.md)
